method: Fresh agents ran read-only planning and explicitly authorized parallel execution on the portable fixture; temporary paths were sanitized from this record.
evidence: selected the repository-owned integration base and sibling task branches
allocated distinct application ports, test databases, cache directories, and log directories
kept install, creation, integration, cleanup, pruning, and deletion behind their authority gates
provided checkable owner handoffs and confirmed repository state unchanged during planning
created two sibling worktrees and ran both repository tests concurrently with isolated slot resources
retained the dirty operator file, worktrees, branches, generated logs, and summary because cleanup was not authorized
